eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Summit, CO; at 12:49 PM ON APR 6, 2026 Effective until 02:49 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Breckenridge Police: Evacuation order issued for the area of South Main St - Breckenridge due to Active bomb threat. LEAVE the area immediately. Leave the area of South Main St - Breckenridge immediately
